# IRS Simulator

> Portuguese personal income tax (IRS) simulator for mainland Portugal. Calculates net salary, tax brackets, deductions, and municipal surcharges for any year from 2008 to 2026.

## Resources

- [2026 Tax Data](https://irs.lixo.dev/tax-data-2026.md): Markdown reference for 2026 IRS brackets, rates, and parameters — includes context notes on how Portuguese IRS works.
- [Full Tax Data JSON](https://irs.lixo.dev/tax-data.json): Complete structured dataset for all years (2008–2026), including tax brackets, specific deductions, Social Security rates, and county tax rates for all 278 mainland municipalities.

## Notes

- Data covers **mainland Portugal only**. Madeira and Azores have separate regional tax rates not included here.
- The JSON dataset is the authoritative source. The markdown file covers 2026 only.
